# Dynawatt Engineering

> Kampala's trusted electrical installation and solar energy
company. BS 7671 certified, ERA licensed, and UEDCL approved.
Serving Kampala, Wakiso, Mukono, and Central Uganda.

## Services

- [Electrical Wiring & Installation](https://dynawattengineering.com/services)
- [Solar Energy Packages DW1–DW5](https://dynawattengineering.com/solar)
- [Architectural & Profile Lighting](https://dynawattengineering.com/services)
- [CCTV Installation](https://dynawattengineering.com/services)
- [3-Phase Industrial Wiring](https://dynawattengineering.com/services)

## Solar Packages

- DW1: 1.5kVA starter package from UGX 4.4M
- DW2: 3kVA home package from UGX 7.4M (most popular)
- DW3: 5kVA mid-range from UGX 10.2M
- DW4: 7.5kVA large home from UGX 14.8M
- DW5: 10kVA commercial from UGX 19.2M

## Credentials

- BS 7671 Certified
- ERA Licensed
- UEDCL Approved
- 3-Month Repair Guarantee on all installations

## Service Areas

Kampala, Wakiso, Mukono, Kira, Entebbe, Nansana, Makindye,
Rubaga, Kawempe, Nakawa, and surrounding areas of Central Uganda.
